sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: BW LPG product services segment provides Q1 2026 update
feed.summary: BW LPG's trading arm, BW Product Services, reported a gross profit of $127 million and a net profit of $98 million for Q1 2026, driven by market volatility and regional conflicts. The Middle East conflict significantly impacted performance by increasing the value of U.S.-sourced cargoes. While a large portion of the profits are currently unrealized accounting gains, they are expected to be realized gradually with physical deliveries.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal Issues £1 Billion Floating Rate Covered Bonds Due 2029
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) has issued £1 billion of floating rate covered bonds due in April 2029 under its global covered bond program. These bonds will be traded in the UK, aiming to diversify BMO's funding sources and enhance its presence in European capital markets. This move highlights the bank's strategy to expand its international footprint and meet institutional investor demand for high-grade, secured debt instruments.

feed.title: Barclays Boosts CF Industries (NYSE:CF) Price Target to $130.00
feed.summary: Barclays has increased its price target for CF Industries (NYSE:CF) to $130.00 from $120.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating, which suggests a potential upside of 7.74%. This comes after CF Industries reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $2.59 EPS and $1.87 billion in revenue. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target of $114.87, some firms like Morgan Stanley have issued higher targets, while insiders have recently sold a notable volume of shares.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Announces Details of Spot Crypto Trading Launch
feed.summary: Charles Schwab is rolling out "Schwab Crypto," a new service allowing retail clients to directly trade bitcoin and ethereum. This offering integrates crypto trading with traditional investments, providing educational resources, professional support, and competitive pricing. The service will be phased in, with plans to add more cryptocurrencies and transfer capabilities in the future.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Issues Positive Forecast for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Stock Price
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus has increased its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) to $228 from $217, maintaining a "buy" rating with an implied upside of 11.12%. Despite a mixed analyst consensus of "Hold" and a $195.50 price target, and recent insider sales totalings $15.64 million, the company recently beat EPS estimates, though revenue declined by 5.7% year-over-year.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Given New $198.00 Price Target at The Goldman Sachs Group
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has raised its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) to $198.00, maintaining a "buy" rating despite implying a slight downside from the current share price. This adjustment comes amidst mixed analyst views, with an overall "Hold" consensus and an average target of $195.50. Old Dominion Freight Line recently beat earnings per share and revenue expectations for the quarter, though revenue saw a year-over-year decline.

feed.title: Ontinue Recognized as a Strong Performer in 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Managed Detection and Response
feed.summary: Ontinue has been recognized as a Strong Performer in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer report for Managed Detection and Response (MDR), based on verified customer feedback. The company received an overall rating of 4.7 out of 5 stars and a 92% "Willingness to Recommend" score, highlighting its AI-powered MXDR service, ION, which helps organizations strengthen cyber resilience and maximize Microsoft security investments. Customers praised Ontinue's deep cybersecurity expertise, collaborative engagement model, and ability to deliver measurable security outcomes.

feed.title: Jefferies raises American Electric Power stock price target on capital outlook
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for American Electric Power (AEP) stock from $150 to $152, while maintaining a Buy rating, citing a positive capital outlook. The firm highlighted AEP's consistent operating earnings guidance and the substantial $72 billion base capital plan, which does not yet fully account for new load additions. Recent strategic initiatives, including senior notes issuance, a significant transmission project in Ohio, and a key leadership appointment, also contribute to the positive sentiment.

feed.title: Nordson director Morris sells $67,098 in NDSN stock
feed.summary: Milton Mayo Morris, a director at Nordson CORP (NASDAQ: NDSN), sold 245 shares of the company's stock for $67,098 on April 15, 2026. This transaction occurred as the stock trades near $275, following a 54% return over the past year, with InvestingPro analysis indicating the stock might be slightly overvalued. Despite this insider sale, Nordson recently reported strong first-quarter fiscal 2026 earnings, exceeding revenue forecasts and announcing a continued dividend.

feed.title: Ecolab (ECL) Valuation Check As Shares Move Without A Clear News Catalyst
feed.summary: Ecolab's (ECL) shares have been active without a specific news catalyst, prompting a valuation check. While the most followed narrative suggests the stock is 15% undervalued with a fair value of $319.29, driven by growth initiatives and pricing power, its P/E ratio of 36.8x is higher than the industry and its own fair ratio, indicating potential valuation risk. Investors are advised to review underlying data to assess the mixed signals.

feed.title: A Look At Phillips 66 (PSX) Valuation After Refinery Supersystem And Pipeline Expansion Plans
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is gaining investor attention following CEO Mark Lashier's comments on refinery consolidation and pipeline expansion, amidst a recent share price pullback but strong long-term returns. Despite a 6.9% one-month drop, the stock boasts a 23.6% YTD return and 73.3% one-year total shareholder return, with analysts suggesting it is 39.9% undervalued with a fair value of $268.71. Investors are advised to consider potential risks like weaker refining margins and regulatory shifts alongside the optimistic valuation.

feed.title: Teledyne FLIR Defense wins $35+ Million surveillance system Contract for Reconnaissance Vehicles
feed.summary: Teledyne FLIR Defense has secured a contract worth over $35 million from WB Electronics S.A. to supply TacFLIR® 280-HDEP multi-spectral surveillance systems for Reconnaissance Vehicles. This system provides advanced daylight and thermal imagery, enhancing situational awareness for military forces. This contract is one of three significant deals totaling over $85 million for Teledyne FLIR Defense in Europe this year, underscoring their growing presence in the defense sector.

feed.title: Teledyne Takes Part In 2026 SeaSEC Challenge Weeks
feed.summary: Teledyne is participating in the 2026 SeaSEC Challenge Weeks, "DATA2SEA," a maritime security exercise focused on real-time multi-sensor data integration for protecting critical underwater infrastructure. The company will deploy a combination of passive acoustic monitoring, active sonar, and surface surveillance technologies for platform and harbor protection challenges. This involvement highlights the importance of integrated sensing and cross-industry collaboration in enhancing maritime situational awareness and security solutions.

feed.title: APO INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors of Securities Class Action Deadline on May 1, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is reminding investors of Apollo Global Management (APO) about the May 1, 2026 deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global Management and its executives made false and misleading statements by denying business dealings with Jeffrey Epstein, despite communications between Apollo leaders and Epstein concerning the firm's tax affairs in the 2010s. News reports led to significant drops in Apollo's stock price, as the company's reputation was harmed by the alleged entanglement.

feed.title: Amex Acquires Hyper to Boost AI and Expense Management Offerings
feed.summary: American Express is acquiring Hyper, an agentic expense management company, to enhance its AI capabilities and integrate AI-powered automation tools into its commercial services. This acquisition aims to provide smarter, more efficient ways for businesses to manage expenses and builds upon a previous collaboration between Amex and Hyper to launch a rewards card with embedded AI-powered expense agents. American Express is also extending customer protection to registered AI agent purchases, safeguarding eligible customers from errors made by AI agents during transactions.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies Issues 2025 Responsibility Report | TYL Stock News
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) has released its seventh annual corporate responsibility report for 2025, detailing its governance practices, team member engagement, and community impact. The report emphasizes the company's long-standing core values and commitment to creating positive effects on stakeholders and communities. Abby Diaz, Tyler's chief administrative officer, highlighted the report's focus on strong governance, an engaged workforce, and enduring client and community relationships, all of which support the company's long-term strategy and public sector leadership.

feed.title: Navy Awards Lockheed Martin $850.4M for Trident Missile Modernization Effort
feed.summary: The Navy has awarded Lockheed Martin Space an $850.4 million cost-plus-incentive-fee modification for the TRIDENT II (D5) Life Extension 2 SSP Alteration Advanced Design and Development Program. This contract is part of a larger list of defense contracts recently awarded, including other significant awards to entities like The University of Texas at Arlington, General Dynamics Electric Boat Corp., and Raytheon Co. The work for Lockheed Martin is expected to be completed by September 30, 2030, and is funded by fiscal 2026 weapons procurement (Navy) funds.

feed.title: Applied Materials Stock Surged 170% Last Year. Can the Rally Continue in 2026?
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) stock surged 170% last year, driven by the AI data center buildout and strong Q1 FY2026 earnings. The company, a leading semiconductor equipment maker, benefits from growing demand in leading-edge logic, DRAM, HBM, and advanced packaging, with a multi-year growth thesis supported by initiatives like the EPIC Center and eBeam metrology platforms. While analysts see potential upside and a compounding EPS cycle, the stock currently trades at a high forward P/E, with its future trajectory dependent on the longevity of the AI equipment cycle and the impact of its strategic investments.

feed.title: Alliant Energy Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.5350 a Share, Payable May 15 to Shareholders of Record as of April 30
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.5350 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 15 to shareholders who are on record as of April 30. The company, which specializes in electricity and natural gas transmission and distribution in Iowa and Wisconsin, also provided details on its recent financial performance and analyst ratings.

feed.title: Apple Shares Sold by Investment Firm
feed.summary: YHB Investment Advisors Inc. has decreased its stake in Apple Inc. by 2.9% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling over 10,000 shares. Despite this reduction, Apple remains the firm's largest holding, making up 6.2% of its portfolio. This adjustment provides insight into broader investment trends concerning the influential tech giant.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) Given New $228.00 Price Target at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) to $228.00, up from $209.00, while maintaining a "hold" rating after the company beat Q1 EPS and revenue expectations. The transportation company's Q1 results showed $1.49 EPS against $1.45 expected and $3.06 billion in revenue, which was a 4.6% year-over-year increase. Despite a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, the stock's elevated P/E ratio and recent insider selling pose short-term valuation risks.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Adjusts Price Target on PNC Financial Services to $268 From $263, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has increased its price target for PNC Financial Services (PNC) to $268 from $263, while reiterating an Outperform rating. This adjustment reflects continued analyst confidence in the banking group, following a series of similar price target revisions from other financial institutions. PNC Financial Services recently reported strong first-quarter loan growth and raised its annual interest income forecast.

feed.title: Walmart is revamping 20 Louisiana stores after $618.9M in upgrades
feed.summary: Walmart plans to remodel 20 stores across Louisiana in 2026, building on a $618.9 million investment made over the past five years to modernize its facilities. The upgrades aim to enhance the in-store and digital shopping experience, expand healthy food options, and introduce new technology and services. Additionally, Walmart and its foundation have contributed significantly to local nonprofits, including donating 14.5 million pounds of food.

feed.title: Barclays raises Fastenal stock price target on higher volumes By Investing.com
feed.summary: Barclays increased its price target for Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) to $45 from $44, maintaining an Equalweight rating, citing higher first-quarter volumes despite pricing falling short of expectations. The industrial distributor achieved 9.0% volume growth and 12.4% daily sales rate growth year-over-year, largely due to new contracts and digital channel penetration. However, pricing pressure led to a 50 basis point gross margin decline, though operating margins improved, supporting the view that high-service distributors can gain market share through supply chain solutions.

feed.title: Stifel Adjusts Price Target on Quanta Services to $654 From $647, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Stifel has raised its price target for Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) shares to $654 from $647, while reiterating its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst price target changes for Quanta Services, indicating continued analyst attention and varying valuations for the company. Quanta Services specializes in providing infrastructure services, primarily in electric power and oil and gas sectors.

feed.title: Insider sales and option exercises reported for BCAX (NASDAQ: BCAX)
feed.summary: A Form 144 SEC filing by Bicara Therapeutics (NASDAQ: BCAX) details proposed insider sales through option exercises and several completed sales of common stock by a reporting person, Ryan Cohlhepp. The filing indicates proposed exercises of 4,500 and 8,000 shares, alongside five completed sales between January and March 2026, with their respective proceeds. This disclosure is a routine compliance notification regarding resale rules, noting no new material corporate action outside of these transactions.

feed.title: John Deere Tests Recycled Plastics in Equipment
feed.summary: John Deere is collaborating with University of Wisconsin-Stout researchers to explore the use of recycled plastic polymers in manufacturing equipment. Students are gaining hands-on experience testing recycled plastics properties, with a focus on meeting performance requirements and promoting sustainability in the industry. This partnership highlights the potential for recycled materials to revolutionize agricultural and construction equipment while also preparing future engineers.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. to Announce First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 30, at 5:30 a.m. CDT. A listen-only teleconference and webcast for analysts and institutional investors will follow at 7:30 a.m. CDT. The full release and supporting materials will be available on the company's investor relations website and PR Newswire.

feed.title: Amgen Shares Acquired by Lbp Am Sa
feed.summary: Institutional investor Lbp Am Sa has significantly increased its stake in Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) by 108.1% in the 4th quarter, now owning 51,776 shares valued at $16.9 million. This suggests Lbp Am Sa's strong confidence in Amgen's future performance and growth prospects as a major player in the pharmaceutical industry. The increase in institutional investment highlights Wall Street's belief in Amgen's long-term potential in developing innovative biologic medicines.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley assumes coverage on Verizon stock with Equalweight rating
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley initiated coverage on Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) with an Equalweight rating and a price target of $49.00. Analysts anticipate that Verizon, currently trading below its fair value, will improve its market share by focusing on customer experience and reducing churn, moving away from relying solely on promotions. The firm projects significant improvements in postpaid phone net adds and adjusted EBITDA growth for 2026, driven by operational efficiencies and a workforce reduction.

feed.title: First Solar, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
feed.summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) is scheduled to release its first-quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026, after the market close on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will also host a conference call and live webcast on the same day at 2:30 PM ET to discuss the results. A webcast replay will be available until Saturday, May 3, 2026.

feed.title: CACI wins $231M contract for special operations satellite support By Investing.com
feed.summary: CACI International Inc (NYSE:CACI) has secured a technology task order worth up to $231 million to deliver satellite communications support to the U.S. Special Operations Command via the Naval Information Warfare Center Atlantic. This contract, with a base year and four option years, extends CACI's nearly two-decade partnership with the command, focusing on providing near-real-time satellite communications support and various engineering and logistics services globally. The defense contractor, with an $11.7 billion market cap and $8.98 billion in revenue, recently completed a $2.6 billion acquisition of ARKA Group L.P. and a $500 million senior notes offering, further expanding its capabilities in the defense sector.

feed.title: Caterpillar to post Q1 results before market open on April 30
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 5:30 a.m. CDT. A listen-only teleconference and webcast for analysts and institutional investors will follow at 7:30 a.m. CDT. The company emphasizes that past earnings-date announcements have typically had minimal impact on stock price.

feed.title: Beyond Meat® Partners with Big Geyser—One of the Nation’s Largest Non-Alcoholic Beverage Distributors
feed.summary: Beyond Meat, Inc. has announced a distribution agreement with Big Geyser, a major non-alcoholic beverage distributor in New York, to launch its functional beverage line, Beyond Immerse. This partnership will expand Beyond Immerse into over 26,000 outlets across the New York metro area, providing consumers with a plant-based beverage offering protein, fiber, antioxidants, and electrolytes. Big Geyser, known for scaling leading brands, will leverage its extensive reach to establish Beyond Immerse in a key market.

feed.title: First Solar, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026
feed.summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ: FSLR) is scheduled to release its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, after market close on Thursday, April 30, 2026. The company will host a conference call and live webcast at 4:30 PM ET on the same day to discuss the results. A webcast replay will be available through May 30, 2026, on the investor relations section of its website.

feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated stock (US7475251036): Is AI chip demand strong enough to unlock sustained upsi
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated is strategically positioned at the forefront of mobile and edge computing through its AI-enabled Snapdragon processors, vital for smartphones, automobiles, and IoT devices. The company's dual-engine model of licensing intellectual property and selling chips provides stability, with a strong focus on on-device AI differentiating it from cloud-heavy competitors. While regulatory scrutiny and competition pose risks, analyst views are largely positive, anticipating long-term growth driven by 5G upgrades and automotive connectivity, alongside new ventures into the PC market.

feed.title: General Mills appoints Anjali Singh as Head for Global Business Solutions
feed.summary: General Mills Inc. has appointed Anjali Singh as the Head of Global Business Solutions, a role that will also see her anchoring the company's India Centre as site lead. This appointment highlights General Mills' commitment to its India Centre in Mumbai as a Global Capability Centre and a strategic hub for talent and innovation. Singh brings over 25 years of experience in strategic operations and digital innovation across various sectors, having previously served as Global Business Head at Ericsson.

feed.title: PNC Financial Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Upbeat Q1 Results
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE: PNC) reported strong first-quarter earnings, with diluted EPS of $4.13 and adjusted EPS of $4.32, surpassing analyst estimates. Despite revenue slightly missing expectations, the company saw a 13% year-over-year increase and successfully closed the FirstBank acquisition. Following the positive results, analysts from B of A Securities and Keefe, Bruyette & Woods raised their price targets for PNC Financial.

feed.title: Prologis stock gains after Q1 earnings beat estimates, 2026 guidance raised to above consensus (PLD:NYSE)
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD) saw its stock rise after reporting first-quarter earnings that surpassed analyst estimates. The industrial REIT also increased its 2026 guidance to above consensus figures. The company achieved record lease signings of 64 million square feet in its logistics portfolio.

feed.title: Burlington Stores Inc stock (US12169T1007): Why store expansion strategy matters more now for invest
feed.summary: This article analyzes Burlington Stores Inc (BURL) as an off-price retailer, highlighting its strategy of acquiring excess inventory and reselling it at discounts, which thrives in inflationary conditions. It emphasizes the company's methodical store expansion, real estate discipline, and robust free cash flow generation as key factors for investors. The piece also discusses Burlington's competitive landscape, resilience during economic downturns, and future growth drivers like targeted store openings and digital integration.

feed.title: BSX Investor Alert: BOSTON SCIENTIFIC CORPORATION Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Allegedly Misrepresenting Electrophysiology Procedure Growth
feed.summary: SueWallSt is encouraging investors who suffered losses in Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) to join a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Boston Scientific misrepresented its electrophysiology (EP) procedure growth between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, leading to a significant stock drop when the slower-than-expected growth and increased competition were disclosed. Investors who purchased BSX securities during this period may be eligible to recover damages.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises® Introduces the Most Exclusive Fine Dining Restaurant at Sea: La Table par Maîtres Cuisiniers de France
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises has announced La Table par Maîtres Cuisiniers de France, an exclusive new fine dining restaurant set to debut aboard the Oceania Sonata in 2027. This restaurant, endorsed by the Maîtres Cuisiniers de France, will be the first and only one at sea to receive such prestigious approval, welcoming just 18 guests for a refined, reservation-only experience. The menu, created by Master Chefs of France Alexis Quaretti and Eric Barale, will showcase exquisite French culinary artistry, further solidifying Oceania Cruises' commitment to culinary excellence.

feed.title: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) Releases Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.05 EPS
feed.summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations with an EPS of $1.18 against a consensus of $1.14. Revenue increased by 4.7% year-over-year, driven by higher interest income and fee revenue. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.52 per share, resulting in a 3.7% yield, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $60.26.

feed.title: SMCI Lawsuit Alleges Allegedly Concealing Export Law Violations - Super Micro Computer Investors Face Losses Following Allegedly Concealing Export Law Violations: SueWallSt
feed.summary: A securities class action lawsuit has been filed against Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI), alleging the company concealed an illegal server diversion scheme to China worth approximately $2.5 billion. The lawsuit claims that while management attributed revenue growth to legitimate AI infrastructure demand, insiders were aware of systematic routing of restricted Nvidia GPU servers to Chinese customers without required licenses, leading to a 33.3% single-day stock collapse. Investors who purchased SMCI stock between April 30, 2024, and March 19, 2026, and incurred losses may be affected, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 25, 2026.

feed.title: Georgia Power court will host adaptive soccer at U.S. training hub
feed.summary: U.S. Soccer and Georgia Power have partnered to create the Georgia Power Court within the Arthur M. Blank U.S. Soccer National Training Center, aiming to enhance accessibility and inclusion for athletes. This dedicated indoor court will host Futsal and adaptive Power Soccer, with the first adaptive event, ADAPTandTHRIVE, scheduled for May 20–24. The partnership underscores Georgia Power's commitment to community investment and expanding opportunities in sports for all athletes, including those with disabilities.

feed.title: City of Hope to track 500 patients with blood test for earlier recurrence
feed.summary: City of Hope and Quest Diagnostics have launched a multi-year research collaboration to evaluate the Haystack MRD® circulating-tumor DNA test for early cancer recurrence in breast, colorectal, ovarian, and prostate cancers. The study will enroll approximately 500 patients across 14 City of Hope sites, generating thousands of longitudinal data points to assess MRD detection, treatment response, and earlier identification of recurrence. This initiative aims to improve patient management and advance liquid biopsy technologies in oncology.

feed.title: Bit Origin lines up financing for a possible move into AI data centers
feed.summary: Bit Origin Ltd (NASDAQ: BTOG) announced it has secured strategic financing to explore expanding into AI-driven computing, storage infrastructure, and cooling services. The company plans to evaluate leasing, managing, and optimizing GPU-based computing and server systems, leveraging its prior collaborations and Bitcoin mining experience. While Bit Origin aims for a capital-efficient approach, the execution of these plans is contingent on additional financing, commercial agreements, and market conditions.

feed.title: Brand Engagement Network (NASDAQ:BNAI) Posts Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.73 EPS
feed.summary: Brand Engagement Network (NASDAQ:BNAI) reported its quarterly earnings, posting a loss of ($0.67) per share, which beat the consensus estimate by $0.73, despite revenue of $0.20 million falling short of analyst expectations of $1.00 million. The company's shares opened at $56.95 with a market capitalization of $255.59 million, and institutional ownership stands at 15.8%, with XTX Topco Ltd recently significantly increasing its stake. Despite an average "Sell" rating from analysts, one firm recently upgraded its rating to "Hold."

feed.title: An 18-seat French restaurant is coming to a cruise ship in 2027
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises announced the debut of La Table par Maîtres Cuisiniers de France, an exclusive 18-seat fine dining restaurant, aboard its new ship Oceania Sonata in 2027. This venue is endorsed by the Maîtres Cuisiniers de France and will feature rotating menus crafted by Master Chefs Alexis Quaretti and Eric Barale, emphasizing classic French techniques and offering luxury experiences like the Dom Pérignon Experience. The announcement reinforces Oceania Cruises' commitment to culinary excellence at sea, adding to Oceania Sonata's ten dining options.

feed.title: APO Investor Alert: APOLLO GLOBAL MANAGEMENT, INC. Securities Fraud Lawsuit - Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Claims Black Concealed Epstein Payments: SueWallSt – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: SueWallSt has announced a securities class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) and its co-founder, Leon Black. The lawsuit alleges that Black concealed his financial ties and communications with Jeffrey Epstein, leading to an artificial inflation of the company's share price. Investors who purchased Apollo Global's stock between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, are encouraged to contact SueWallSt to potentially lead the class action.
